what_it_does: This file is a ledger attachment record in channel-memory that links an image asset to the design-source channel.
observations: The file consists only of YAML frontmatter with no body content.
The target is the image URI 'image://design-source/capital-raise/p-24'.
There are no code symbols present.
standouts: References a specific image asset 'p-24' inside the 'capital-raise' folder of the 'design-source' channel.
Typed as an 'images' attachment with a precise UTC timestamp.
Contains only metadata, no descriptive caption or content.
concerns: No title, caption, or description of the image.
The target URI cannot be verified from this file alone.
notes: A minimal, timestamped ledger entry that records an image attachment from the design-source channel to capital-raise/p-24.
questions: Does the referenced image asset actually exist?
How is this attachment related to other attachments in the same channel?
purpose_vs_actual: Stated purpose matches actual content: it records an image attachment for a channel.
intention_signals: It appears to be trying to catalog image assets attached to the design-source channel so they can be tracked and retrieved.
contribution: Provides a persistent, timestamped pointer from a channel to a specific image asset, supporting retrieval and provenance tracking.
summary_for_embedding: A channel-memory attachment ledger entry linking the design-source channel to image asset p-24 in capital-raise, typed as images, with an added timestamp.
intention_for_embedding: To record that an image attachment was added to the design-source channel pointing to capital-raise/p-24.
